email_template.subject: 🍂 September Shine Special - Save $30 on Premium Detailing!
email_template.preview_text: Get your car fall-ready with 20% off our premium package
email_template.content:
Fall weather is just around the corner...

Don't let dirt, dust, and summer wear take a toll on your vehicle! Our September Shine Special gives you everything you need to protect your car before the harsh fall and winter weather hits.

🌟 WHAT'S INCLUDED:
• Complete exterior wash & premium wax
• Interior deep cleaning & conditioning
• Tire shine & trim protection  
• Dashboard & leather treatment
• FREE seasonal air freshener

💰 SPECIAL PRICE: Just $119 (regularly $149)
💵 YOU SAVE: $30

📅 VALID THROUGH: September 30, 2025

[BOOK NOW BUTTON] → clintondetailing.com/booking
Or call us: (815) 718-8936

Why Clinton Auto Detailing?
✅ Mobile service - we come to you
✅ 5-star customer rating
✅ 100% satisfaction guarantee
✅ Same-day service available

Don't wait - fall weather is coming fast! Book your September Shine Special today.

Best regards,
Clinton Auto Detailing Team
